name: tech-doc
description: 技术协作场景下撰写与维护高质量技术文档的统一写作指南。
capabilities: Applies pyramid writing structure with conclusions first
Creates documentation following established writing baselines
Formats content using Markdown with proper heading hierarchy
Maintains factual accuracy without adding assumptions
Structures SOP documents with task-oriented formatting
Implements consistent citation and referencing standards
author: DCjanus
securitySummary: This is a documentation-only skill containing writing guidelines for technical documentation. No executable code, network calls, file system access, or environment variables are present. All 18 static findings are false positives triggered by documentation keywords being misinterpreted as security-sensitive terms (e.g., 'hash', 'structure', 'auth' in plain text descriptions). The skill is purely instructional content for writing quality technical documentation.
valueStatement: Transform scattered technical information into clear, structured documentation that teams can actually use. This skill provides proven writing frameworks that make technical content accessible and maintainable.
limitations: Only provides writing guidelines, not automated formatting tools
Requires manual implementation of documentation standards
Guidelines originally written for Chinese documentation practices
Does not generate actual documentation content automatically

useCases.title: Standardize team documentation
useCases.description: Establish consistent writing standards across your technical team to improve documentation quality and readability.

useCases.title: Write better API documentation
useCases.description: Create clear, concise API docs that follow industry best practices and help users integrate quickly.

useCases.title: Improve knowledge sharing
useCases.description: Implement documentation guidelines that ensure critical technical knowledge is properly captured and shared.

promptTemplates.title: Basic Documentation
promptTemplates.prompt: Help me write documentation for our REST API endpoint using the tech-doc guidelines to create a clear, structured guide.

promptTemplates.title: SOP Creation
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a standard operating procedure for deploying our microservices using tech-doc formatting standards with prerequisites and common errors.

promptTemplates.title: Technical Explanation
promptTemplates.prompt: Write a technical explanation of our event-driven architecture following tech-doc guidelines with conclusion first approach.

promptTemplates.title: Advanced Documentation
promptTemplates.prompt: Develop comprehensive documentation for our data pipeline including introduction, architecture, deployment, and troubleshooting using tech-doc standards.

bestPractices: Always start with a clear conclusion before explaining details
Use consistent terminology throughout all documentation
Include practical examples that users can copy and execute
antiPatterns: Writing long paragraphs without clear structure or headings
Adding assumptions or information not present in source material
Using passive voice or overly complex sentence structures

faq.question: Is this skill compatible with English documentation?
faq.answer: Yes, while the guidelines are in Chinese, the principles apply to any language. The structural recommendations work universally.

faq.question: What are the limits of this skill?
faq.answer: This skill provides writing guidelines only. It does not automatically format or generate documentation content.

faq.question: Can I integrate this with my existing documentation tools?
faq.answer: The guidelines work with any platform that supports Markdown including GitHub, Confluence, and static site generators.

faq.question: How does this ensure data safety?
faq.answer: This is a guideline-only skill with no code execution or data access. It simply provides writing standards.

faq.question: What if my team has different writing preferences?
faq.answer: Use these guidelines as a baseline and adapt specific rules to match your team's style while maintaining core principles.

faq.question: How does this compare to automated documentation tools?
faq.answer: Unlike automated tools, this focuses on writing quality and structure principles that improve readability and maintainability.
